patch.value: Fix all-release-tags collapsing legacy historical sections after orphaned git tags

all-release-tags mode uses git tag --list --merged HEAD, which excludes orphaned release tags from rebased/squashed history. Downstream repos like pm-slack-standup have 20 May/June tags that are not merged into main after a history rewrite, causing --all-release-tags to collapse all pre-July items into the oldest reachable release window (2026.7.6) instead of preserving 13+ historical sections.

Fix: include ALL matching tags regardless of merge status so orphaned release tags still define release windows. For item-to-release assignment, prefer explicit item.release metadata, then accurate close/update timestamps.

Also fix audit:prod which fails on inherited allowScripts.

value.note: External blocker: pm-slack-standup SDK hardening pass that introduced audit:prod env-neutral pattern and depends on correct changelog output
External review reference for the historical-boundary regression
Removed --merged HEAD from listReleaseTags to include orphaned git tags
Updated existing test to expect orphaned tag inclusion; added orphaned-tag regression test and historical-boundary-preservation test

value.author: codex-pm-changelog,created_at=now,text=ROOT CAUSE: listReleaseTags in release-context.ts used 'git tag --list --merged HEAD' which excludes orphaned release tags from rebased/squashed history. pm-slack-standup has 20 May/June tags (v2026.05.26 through v2026.06.14) that are not merged into HEAD after a history rewrite, so --all-release-tags only found 4 July tags and collapsed all 30+ pre-July closed items into the oldest reachable window (2026.7.6).
value.text:
author=codex-pm-changelog,created_at=now,text=ROOT CAUSE: listReleaseTags in release-context.ts used 'git tag --list --merged HEAD' which excludes orphaned release tags from rebased/squashed history. pm-slack-standup has 20 May/June tags (v2026.05.26 through v2026.06.14) that are not merged into HEAD after a history rewrite, so --all-release-tags only found 4 July tags and collapsed all 30+ pre-July closed items into the oldest reachable window (2026.7.6).

FIX: Removed --merged HEAD from the git tag listing so all matching tags are found regardless of merge status. Chronological sort ensures correct window ordering. Item-to-window assignment prefers explicit item.release metadata (already correct), then time-based assignment using closed_at/updated_at/created_at.

EVIDENCE: pm-slack-standup output now shows 14 historical sections (2026.5.26 through 2026.7.10) instead of 2 collapsed sections. Full test suite: 131 pass, 0 fail. audit:prod environment-neutral (uses env -u npm_config_allow_scripts). Two new regression tests added: resolveReleaseTagWindows includes orphaned tags from non-merged branches + createChangelog preserves historical sections with orphaned-git-tag boundaries.

patch.value: "note":"Merged pending tag into tags with descending-timestamp sort so orphan tags after pending do not create inverted windows"}

value.note: Removed --merged HEAD from listReleaseTags to include orphaned git tags
Updated existing test to expect orphaned tag inclusion; added orphaned-tag regression test and historical-boundary-preservation test

patch.value:
ROOT CAUSE: listReleaseTags in release-context.ts used 'git tag --list --merged HEAD' which excludes orphaned release tags from rebased/squashed history. pm-slack-standup has 20 May/June tags (v2026.05.26 through v2026.06.14) that are not merged into HEAD after a history rewrite, so --all-release-tags only found 4 July tags and collapsed all 30+ pre-July closed items into the oldest reachable window (2026.7.6).

FIX: Removed --merged HEAD from listReleaseTags so all matching tags are found regardless of merge status. Pending tag merged into sorted tags array by timestamp descending (with name tie-breaker) to prevent inverted windows. Chronological sort ensures correct window ordering. Item-to-window assignment prefers explicit item.release metadata (already correct), then time-based assignment using closed_at/updated_at/created_at.

EVIDENCE: 131-test release gate (0 fail). pm-slack-standup output now shows 14 historical sections (2026.5.26 through 2026.7.10) instead of 2 collapsed sections — 24 orphaned May/June tags vs 4 merged July tags. audit:prod environment-neutral (uses env -u npm_config_allow_scripts). Two new regression tests: resolveReleaseTagWindows includes orphaned tags from non-merged branches + createChangelog preserves historical sections with orphaned-git-tag boundaries. Greptile review 72d20421-e8df-4b89-b369-ee86161c0ec1: no actionable comments.
